narrative:
Perry Township has 3,721 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Republican lean of 4.0 percentage points.
